title: Color-Coded Enchantments
description: Groups enchanted books into colored categories, all in vanilla
body:
![Colored enchantment books in the creative inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zTiv8L2A/images/e8c09529e5193c510f44f2729dc0b4936a56685a.png)

**Works completely in vanilla, and does not require mods such as Optifine or CIT Resewn.**

Adds several texture variants for enchanted books intended to feel similar to the vanilla texture. Instead of having separate textures for every enchantment, books are separated into 10 color-coded groups to avoid being overwhelming.

## List of color groups:
- Brown (Default) - Bow and Crossbow enchantments, as well as modded ones
- Gray - Protection, Efficiency, Unbreaking, etc.
- Green - Smite and Bane of Arthropods
- Orange - Fire-related enchantments
- Sculk - Swift Sneak, Soul Speed, and Mace enchantments
- Aqua - Ocean-related enchantments
- Gold - Fortune, Mending, and Looting
- Skull - Curse enchantments
- Prismarine - Trident enchantments
- Feather - Feather Falling, Wind Burst, etc.
